action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Review of My Compensation

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to request a review of my compensation and to discuss potential adjustments to my salary. Over the past [number] years, I have dedicated myself to [mention specific achievements or responsibilities] and have consistently delivered results that exceed expectations.

As I look to the future, I believe it is essential to align my compensation with the value I bring to the company. I have taken on additional responsibilities, such as [mention any new responsibilities or projects], and I am confident that my contributions have been instrumental in driving [mention specific outcomes or metrics].

I am open to discussing various options, including a salary increase, a performance-based bonus, or a combination of both. I am committed to finding a mutually beneficial solution that reflects my contributions and aligns with the company's goals.

Could we schedule a meeting to discuss this further? I am available [mention your availability] to discuss this in more detail.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

P.P.S. I am willing to discuss any additional factors that may be relevant to my compensation, such as my performance review or industry benchmarks.
action.label: response
